turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, what are your clinic timings? And do you have parking available?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hello! Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic is open Monday through Saturday from 8 AM to 9 PM, and on Sundays from 9 AM to 2 PM for OPD. We do have a basement parking facility that can accommodate around 60 vehicles, and it's free for patients.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Oh great. And where exactly are you located?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We're located at Plot 14, Baner Road, near the Baner-Balewadi junction, Pune 411045. There are landmarks like D-Mart and Symbiosis Institute nearby if you're navigating.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Perfect, and umm, do you have a pharmacy on site?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, we have an in-house pharmacy on the ground floor that's open from 8 AM to 10 PM on all days including Sundays.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: You're most welcome. Feel free to call if you have any other questions!
